index.featuresHeading: Enterprise-Grade Features for Oil & Gas Invoice Processing
index.featuresSubheading: Comprehensive automation platform built for Canadian energy sector accounts payable teams. Process field tickets, vendor invoices, AFE documentation, and joint venture billing with industry-leading accuracy.
index.faqSubheading: Everything you need to know about automated invoice processing
index.faq1q: What is automated invoice processing for oil and gas?
index.faq1a: Automated invoice processing uses AI and machine learning to automatically extract data from oil and gas invoices, validate them against purchase orders, detect duplicates, and route them for approval. FlowBills processes invoices with 95% straight-through processing, reducing manual data entry by 80% and cutting processing costs significantly.
index.faq2q: How does FlowBills ensure PIPEDA compliance?
index.faq2a: FlowBills is built with PIPEDA compliance from the ground up. We implement data encryption at rest and in transit, role-based access controls, audit logging, data retention policies, and privacy-by-design principles. All personal information is handled according to Canadian privacy law requirements.
index.faq3q: Can FlowBills integrate with our existing accounting system?
index.faq3a: Yes, FlowBills integrates with major accounting and ERP systems used in the oil and gas industry including SAP, Oracle, QuickBooks, Sage, and custom systems via API.
index.faq4q: How does duplicate invoice detection work?
index.faq4a: FlowBills uses advanced algorithms to detect duplicate invoices by analyzing multiple data points including vendor name, invoice number, date, amount, and PO number. The system uses fuzzy matching to catch duplicates even when invoice numbers or amounts vary slightly.
index.faq5q: What is the ROI timeline for implementing FlowBills?
index.faq5a: Most Canadian oil and gas companies see ROI within 3-6 months. Typical savings include 80% reduction in invoice processing costs, 95% straight-through processing rate, elimination of duplicate payments, faster approval cycles, and reduced audit costs.
index.faq6q: Does FlowBills support e-invoicing and Peppol?
index.faq6a: Yes, FlowBills supports e-invoicing standards including Peppol, EN 16931, and country-specific formats. Our platform can receive, validate, and process electronic invoices while maintaining compliance with Canadian and international e-invoicing regulations.
index.faq7q: How secure is my invoice data?
index.faq7a: FlowBills implements enterprise-grade security including AES-256 encryption, SOC 2 compliant infrastructure, regular security audits, multi-factor authentication, and role-based access controls. All data is stored in Canadian data centers.

pricing.title: Simple, Volume-Based Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No per-seat charges. Pay based on invoice volume. Unlimited internal users and vendor access included.
pricing.calculatorDesc: Estimate your monthly cost based on invoice volume
pricing.starterDesc: Perfect for small to medium teams getting started with automation
pricing.growthDesc: For growing businesses with higher invoice volumes
pricing.customIntegrationsDesc: API access, custom connectors, dedicated infrastructure
pricing.faq1a: No. All internal team members and vendor portal users are included at no additional cost. You only pay based on invoice volume processed.
pricing.faq2a: Any invoice uploaded and run through our OCR extraction pipeline counts toward your monthly limit. Drafts, deleted invoices, and failed uploads do not count.
pricing.faq3q: Can I upgrade or downgrade anytime?
pricing.faq3a: Yes. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle. If you exceed your plan's included volume, overage charges apply automatically.
pricing.faq4q: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faq4a: We accept all major credit cards via Stripe. Enterprise customers can arrange ACH/wire transfers and annual invoicing.
pricing.faq5a: Yes. All plans include a 14-day free trial with full feature access. No credit card required to start.
